description: Style NoteNail that corporate style with these sharp derby shoes from arrow with a clean silhouette and tough stitches. If you're looking for a comfy formal shoe that has the durability of everyday staples, this is the right pair. What's more, its designed with an ultra-fashionable cut and three-hole lace-ups!Product DetailsBlack pointy toed leather shoes with three hole lace-upsHas stitch detail at the toe boxLightly cushioned footbedUpper adhered to the outosleTPR outsole with a stacked heel and branded grooves at the forefoot regionMaterial and CareLeatherUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to clean this product
